task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the ReleaseNotesTemplate with the correct tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'ReleaseNotesTemplate' that has the tag '$:/tags/ViewTemplate' applied to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the template contains the three required markdown headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the content of 'ReleaseNotesTemplate' (either in edit mode or rendered) and verify the presence of '### 🚀 Features', '### 🐛 Bug Fixes', and '### ⚠️ Warnings'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the v18.2.0 release tiddler with the correct tag and body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'v18.2.0' with the tag 'Release'. The main body text of this tiddler should be exactly 'This is the June release.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Feature PR is dynamically displayed in the v18.2.0 tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rendered view of the 'v18.2.0' tiddler, look under the '🚀 Features' heading for a bullet point containing a link to 'Add onRecoverableError option' followed by 'by @acdlite'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Bug Fix PR is dynamically displayed in the v18.2.0 tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rendered view of the 'v18.2.0' tiddler, look under the '🐛 Bug Fixes' heading for a bullet point containing a link to 'Fix hydration mismatch with useId' followed by 'by @danabramov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Warning PR is dynamically displayed in the v18.2.0 tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rendered view of the 'v18.2.0' tiddler, look under the '⚠️ Warnings' heading for a bullet point containing a link to 'Deprecate renderToNodeStream' followed by 'by @sebmarkbage'.

task_completion.description: Verify that PRs targeting other releases are excluded from v18.2.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ensure that the PR 'Support Promise as a child' (which targets v18.3.0) does NOT appear anywhere in the rendered 'v18.2.0' tiddler.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser being actively used (e.g., clicking 'New Tiddler', typing in the editor), rather than just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the PR lists are dynamically generated and not hardcoded into the release tiddler.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the edit view of 'v18.2.0' is visible, its text field should ONLY contain 'This is the June release.' without any hardcoded markdown lists of the PRs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by editing backend files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening the underlying TiddlyWiki HTML or JSON files in a text editor (like nano or vim) to manually inject the answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is 'ReleaseNotesTemplate'. The target release tiddler is 'v18.2.0'. The v18.2.0 release should dynamically include the following PRs: Feature: 'Add onRecoverableError option' (author: @acdlite), Bug: 'Fix hydration mismatch with useId' (author: @danabramov), Warning: 'Deprecate renderToNodeStream' (author: @sebmarkbage). The PR 'Support Promise as a child' targets v18.3.0 and must not appear in the v18.2.0 release notes.
